title: Portuguese Pudding Parfait
description: A rich and creamy Portuguese-style dessert, layered with almond biscuits and topped with a crunchy mellow crust. Perfect for hot summer days!
instructions: Crush the almond biscuits into fine crumbs and mix with sugar.
Press the crumb mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until lightly golden.
Allow the crust to cool completely.
In a separate bowl, whip the Portuguese pudding until smooth.
Pour the pudding over the cooled crust.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
